reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for deterministic review packet and prompt rendering behavior; do not treat this as external judge-provider proof.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic review packet status behavior: variants either report passed, blocked, and failed status with machine-readable reason codes or they do not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused CLI tests: review variants produce passed, blocked, and failed status packets, preserve blocked reason codes, and classify unavailable executors as blocked rather than negative review verdicts.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing review variant status normalization, blocked/failed reason codes, or review-summary aggregation.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic prompt-rendering behavior over a JSON artifact selected by `--output-text-key`.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused CLI tests: output-under-test mode records the requested JSON key and renders the extracted narrative span under Output Under Test Text in the review prompt.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing output-under-test prompt rendering or JSON text extraction semantics.
